title: Excluded company audit log
description: Internal record of every candidate dropped before the final list, and why. Not shown to end users as recommendations, but kept for auditability and for tuning the workflow.

reason.description: not_found: no real company matched the name. entity_mismatch: evidence describes a different company with the same or a similar name. firmographic_mismatch: criterion confirmed but the company is outside the target firmographic band (see docs/05-pitfalls.md).

detail.description: The specific evidence or reasoning behind the exclusion.
